channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: The Halal Guys: World Cup Fan Feast Meal
item.guid: The Halal Guys-World Cup Fan Feast Meal-2026-07-11
item.description: Feeds 4–5 with protein, rice, pita, toppings and sauce packs — perfect for watch-party groups. (Through July 19, 2026)

item.title: Panera Bread: BOGO for $5 — Promo Code BOGO5
item.guid: Panera Bread-BOGO for $5 — Promo Code BOGO5-2026-07-11
item.description: Buy one full sandwich, salad, bowl or soup and get a second for just $5 using code BOGO5. (Limited time)

item.title: Chipotle: Free Entrée with $25+ Order — Big Value Week
item.guid: Chipotle-Free Entrée with $25+ Order — Big Value -2026-07-11
item.description: Order $25 or more via the Chipotle app or website this week and score a free entrée. (Through July 15, 2026)

item.title: Moe's Southwest Grill: BOGO Free Entrees
item.description: Buy one entrée and get a second free at Moe's through July 12 — bowls, burritos and more qualify. (Through July 12, 2026)

item.title: 7-Eleven: Free Small Slurpee — Slurpee Day (7/11)
item.description: Celebrate 60 years of Slurpees with a free small Slurpee at any 7-Eleven today — no purchase or membership required. (July 11, 2026 only)

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza for $9.99 — Includes Stuffed Crust
item.guid: Domino's-Any Pizza for $9.99 — Includes Stuffed C-2026-07-11
item.description: Order any pizza with up to 7 toppings, including Parmesan Stuffed Crust, for just $9.99 via the app. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Pizza Hut: $7.99 Carryout — Any 1-Topping Pizza or 8pc Wings
item.guid: Pizza Hut-$7.99 Carryout — Any 1-Topping Pizza or -2026-07-11
item.description: Score a 1-topping carryout pizza (not XL) or 8-piece wings or boneless chicken for just $7.99. (Limited time)

item.title: Sonic: America $2.50 Menu — Last Days
item.description: Grab a Jr. Double Cheeseburger, All-American Hot Dog, medium Onion Rings, or Red White & Blue Slush Float for just $2.50 each. (Through July 12, 2026)

item.title: Arby's: BOGO Free Sandwich — App Deal This Weekend
item.guid: Arby's-BOGO Free Sandwich — App Deal This Weeke-2026-07-11
item.description: Use the Arby's app to buy one sandwich and get a second sandwich of your choice free, valid Friday through Sunday. (July 13, 2026)

item.title: McDonald's: FIFA World Cup 26 Meal with Collectible Cup
item.guid: McDonald's-FIFA World Cup 26 Meal with Collectible -2026-07-11
item.description: Order the FIFA World Cup 26 Meal via the McDonald's app and receive a limited-edition gold-packaged collectible cup. (Limited time)

item.title: KFC: Value Feast Boxes from $7
item.description: Choose from $7, $9, or $11 Value Feast Boxes — each includes a combo of KFC Snackers, nuggets, fries and a drink. (Limited time)

item.title: Popeyes: $6 Big Box — Chicken + 2 Sides + Biscuit
item.guid: Popeyes-$6 Big Box — Chicken + 2 Sides + Biscuit-2026-07-11
item.description: Get two pieces of chicken or three tenders, two sides, and a biscuit for just $6 at the Popeyes app. (Limited time)

item.title: Wendy's: $5 Biggie Bag
item.description: Get a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger, 4pc nuggets, small fries and small drink for $5 via the Wendy's app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: The Luxe Cravings Box includes a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Crunchy Taco, chips, and medium drink for $5.99 in the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Panera Bread: Mix & Match $4.99 Half-Portion Menu
item.description: Pick any half-portion soup, sandwich or salad for $4.99 each — save about 40% vs. full price when building a combo. (Ongoing)

item.title: Subway: Moana Movie Meal Deal — $1 Upgrade
item.description: Upgrade any combo meal for $1 more to receive a collectible Moana cup plus a $15 Fandango promo code for movie tickets. (Limited time)

item.title: El Pollo Loco: Frescas Salads & Wraps — Healthy LTO Menu
item.guid: El Pollo Loco-Frescas Salads & Wraps — Healthy LTO-2026-07-11
item.description: New Citrus Avocado and Mexican Cobb Fresca Salads and Wraps feature fire-grilled chicken under 500 calories — available at the drive-thru. (Limited time)
